rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication Against Plaintiffs Victor Tung And Rong Hu
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT AMI QI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication Against Plaintiffs Victor Tung And Rong Hu DENIED. Moving party failed to provide a mandatory 75 day notice of the motion. The notice of errata was not filed in time to provide 75 day notice per CCP 437c(a)(2). The original filing did not provide any indication at to whether the fourth cause of action was omitted from the Notice and Separate Statement by mistake or it was included in the Points and Authorities by mistake.= (501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required.= (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANTs LELAND RYAN and FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED as to the third cause of action for conversion. Plaintiff failed to create a triable issue of fact as to this cause of action as plead in the complaint. Motion for Summary Adjudication is framed by the pleadings. Hearing Required re: 4th cause of action.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Staying Deposition And Quashing Deposition Notice And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT AMI QI's Motion For Order Staying Deposition And Quashing Deposition Notice And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,950.= (501/REQ)
